deals.deal: Free Medium Fries every Friday with $1+ purchase
deals.desc: Every Friday, app users get a free medium fries with any $1 or more purchase via the McDonald's app.

deals.deal: McValue $5 Meal Deal
deals.desc: Get a sandwich, side, and drink bundled together for $5 through the McDonald's app at participating locations.

deals.deal: FIFA World Cup Meal – Collectible Cups + App Points
deals.desc: Order the FIFA World Cup Meal via the app to earn rewards points redeemable for FIFA Rivals and Coca-Cola/Panini prizes through July 19, 2026.

deals.deal: Whopper Wednesdays – Discounted Whopper in App
deals.desc: Royal Perks members can score a discounted Whopper or Impossible Whopper every Wednesday via the BK app.

deals.deal: Royal Perks Free Upsize Daily
deals.desc: Royal Perks members can upsize fries, hash browns, or a fountain drink or coffee once per day for free.

deals.deal: Taco Bell Rewards Sign-Up Free Item
deals.desc: New Taco Bell Rewards members get a free taco or burrito of their choice just for joining via the app.

deals.deal: $1 Drinks 2–5 PM Daily
deals.desc: Score a medium fountain drink or freeze for just $1 every day from 2 PM to 5 PM local time.

deals.deal: $9.99 'Best Deal Ever' Any Large Pizza thru July 26
deals.desc: Get any large pizza with up to 7 toppings including Parmesan Stuffed Crust for $9.99 via app or online through July 26, 2026.

deals.deal: Mix & Match $6.99 Each (2+ Items)
deals.desc: Choose from medium 2-topping pizzas, boneless chicken, specialty chicken, cheesy breads, pasta, or sandwiches for $6.99 each with a 2-item minimum.

deals.deal: $10 Any Large Pizza Carryout
deals.desc: Get any large pizza for $10 on carryout orders placed online or via the Pizza Hut app.

deals.deal: America's $2.50 Menu through July 12
deals.desc: Celebrate the 4th with Sonic's limited-time $2.50 menu including hot dogs, Jr. Double Cheeseburgers, onion rings and more, in-app or in-drive-in.

deals.deal: Happy Hour – Half-Price Drinks & Slushes Any Time in App
deals.desc: App users get half-price drinks and slushes all day long; everyone else gets the deal from 2–4 PM daily.

deals.deal: Daily App Coupons – Free Frosty & $2 Off Combos
deals.desc: Wendy's app users get rotating daily coupons including a free Frosty and $2 off combo meals.

deals.deal: $6 Big Box – 2pc Chicken + 2 Sides + Biscuit
deals.desc: Get 2 pieces of chicken (or 3 tenders) plus 2 sides and a biscuit for just $6 via the Popeyes app.

deals.deal: $4 Chicken & Tenders Box + $10 Bucket of the Day
deals.desc: KFC offers a $4 Chicken and Tenders Box plus $10 Bucket of the Day deals on weekdays via app.

deals.deal: $6 Breakfast Meal Deal for Rewards Members
deals.desc: Dunkin' Rewards members get a Wake-Up Wrap, crispy hash browns, and a medium hot or iced coffee bundled for just $6.

deals.deal: Mobile Mondays – 100 Bonus Points
deals.desc: Earn 100 bonus Dunkin' Rewards points when you order ahead in the app on Mondays.

deals.deal: Free Mod Mondays for Rewards Members
deals.desc: Starbucks Rewards members get a free drink modification (like extra shots or syrups) on Mondays via the app.

deals.deal: 6" Sub of the Day Meal for $6.99
deals.desc: Every day, get a 6-inch sub of the day plus chips or a cookie and a drink for $6.99 via Subway app or online.

deals.deal: $12 Hot Honey Chicken Plate Offer (App)
deals.desc: Redeem the $12 Hot Honey Chicken Plate promo through the Sweetgreen app or website; offer expires July 31, 2026.

deals.deal: 15% Off First Catering Order $50+ (Code: FESTIVE15)
deals.desc: New catering customers get 15% off their first Sweetgreen catering order of $50+ placed July 1–Sept 30, 2026 with code FESTIVE15.

deals.deal: CAVA Rewards – Free Bowl on Birthday + Points for Free Dips
deals.desc: CAVA app rewards members earn points redeemable for free dips and bowls, plus a free bowl during their birthday month.

deals.deal: Free Upsize Friday for Rewards Members
deals.desc: Smoothie King Rewards members get a free upsize from 20 oz to 32 oz every Friday via the app.

deals.deal: 50% Off + FIFA World Cup Hat Trick Tango LTO
deals.desc: Jamba launched the limited-time Hat Trick Tango smoothie for the FIFA World Cup 2026, plus check the app for 50% off offers.
